ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "college_name" TEXT /* Name of the college the player attended */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Overall pick number in the draft */,
  "draft_team" TEXT /* Team that drafted the player */,
  "player_dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "player_height" INTEGER /* Height of the player (in inches) */,
  "player_weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player (in pounds) */,
  "player_nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "player_position" TEXT /* Primary position the player plays */,
  "player_status" TEXT /* Current status of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_code" TEXT /* Abbreviated code for the team (e.g., LAC, MEM) */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to */,
  "team_founded" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_arena" TEXT /* Name of the team's home arena */,
  "team_city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_year" INTEGER /* Year the season started */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "playoff_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the playoffs */,
  "playoff_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the playoffs */,
  "champion_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that won the championship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Season the game belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "overtime" TEXT /* Whether the game went into overtime */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  "game_location" TEXT /* Location of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total minutes played */,
  "points" REAL /* Total points scored */,
  "rebounds" REAL /* Total rebounds */,
  "assists" REAL /* Total assists */,
  "field_goals_made" INTEGER /* Total field goals made */,
  "field_goals_attempted" INTEGER /* Total field goals attempted */,
  "three_pointers_made" INTEGER /* Total three-pointers made */,
  "three_pointers_attempted" INTEGER /* Total three-pointers attempted */,
  "free_throws_made" INTEGER /* Total free throws made */,
  "free_throws_attempted" INTEGER /* Total free throws attempted */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Total blocks */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Total steals */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Total turnovers */,
  "fouls" INTEGER /* Total personal fouls */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "draft_picks" (
  "draft_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each draft pick */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that made the pick */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round the player was drafted in */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the round */,
  "draft_pick_value" REAL /* Estimated value of the draft pick */,
  "draft_pick_return_on_investment" REAL /* Return on investment for the draft pick */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("draft_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_draft_picks_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_draft_picks_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player position */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position the player plays */,
  "position_start_date" TEXT /* Date the player started playing the position */,
  "position_end_date" TEXT /* Date the player stopped playing the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_positions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player award */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "award_year" INTEGER /* Year the award was given */,
  "award_description" TEXT /* Description of the award */,
  "award_significance" TEXT /* Significance of the award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "injury_description" TEXT /* Description of the injury */,
  "games_missed" INTEGER /* Number of games missed due to the injury */,
  "injury_recovery_date" TEXT /* Date the player is expected to recover */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Current status of the injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_salaries" (
  "salary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player salary */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "salary" REAL /* Salary for the season */,
  "salary_type" TEXT /* Type of salary */,
  "salary_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the salary */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_salaries_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_salaries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "advanced_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each advanced statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "true_shooting_percentage" REAL /* True shooting percentage */,
  "effective_field_goal_percentage" REAL /* Effective field goal percentage */,
  "free_throw_rate" REAL /* Free throw rate */,
  "per" REAL /* Player Efficiency Rating */,
  "ws" REAL /* Win Shares */,
  "bpm" REAL /* Box Plus/Minus */,
  "vorp" REAL /* Value Over Replacement Player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_advanced_stats_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_advanced_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team statistic */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "points_per_game" REAL /* Points per game */,
  "win_percentage" REAL /* Win percentage for the season */,
  "points_allowed_per_game" REAL /* Points allowed per game */,
  "rebounds_per_game" REAL /* Rebounds per game */,
  "assists_per_game" REAL /* Assists per game */,
  "steals_per_game" REAL /* Steals per game */,
  "blocks_per_game" REAL /* Blocks per game */,
  "turnovers_per_game" REAL /* Turnovers per game */,
  "fouls_per_game" REAL /* Fouls per game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_stats_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)
